name: The Living Void
description:
Two paths lay before you:

  1. You meet then become Thing, an incomprehensible entity, of incomprehensible power, only describable by the fact that it is not a lack.

    1. You are the king of space, of the Void between universes and realities, a non-human entity with the ability to turn into any form, speak reality into being, and hear the narrator. Now you are here, wherever here is. Why are you here and will you do?
creator: CryptoMynd
